stakeholders.escalation_threshold_label: £500k to CEO; material regulatory to Board

company_context.open_notes: UK/US acquisition next quarter — diligence active across regulatory, privacy, commercial

practice_areas.name: Commercial
practice_areas.body: Customers, vendors, suppliers, and contract memory live here. Instructions pull profile detail and search negotiated terms.

area_profile.ai-governance-model-risk-classification: In-house cross-functional review (compliance, infoSec, business line sign-off) for all models before production. External validation brought in for higher-risk AI-driven decisions (payment routing, customer credit). Keeps us nimble but defensible with regulators.

practice_areas.name: Privacy
